phases.description: Enhance existing collaboration diagram skill with boundary support and participant stereotypes
Implement multi-level process decomposition and folder organization
Ensure full EDPS methodology compliance and validation tooling
Migrate Project 1 artifacts, integrate with existing skills, enhance OrgModel

tasks.title: Enhance Collaboration Diagram Skill with Boundary Support
tasks.description: Extend diagram-generatecollaboration skill to support Mermaid box syntax for boundary representation while maintaining backward compatibility

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Generate collaboration diagrams with box boundaries
Maintain 100% compatibility with Project 1 skill invocations
Detect boundaries automatically based on interaction patterns
Generate valid Mermaid syntax rendering correctly in VS Code

tasks.title: Implement Participant Stereotype Classification
tasks.description: Add participant type classification (actor, boundary, control, entity) with Mermaid @{type} annotation syntax

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Classify participants using actor/boundary/control/entity types
Generate Mermaid @{type} annotations in participant definitions
Apply decomposition rules based on participant type
Ensure boundary participants receive actor messages first

tasks.title: Add Mermaid Box Syntax Generation
tasks.description: Implement Mermaid box syntax generator for creating boundary boxes with proper participant grouping and nesting

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Generate valid Mermaid box syntax for boundary grouping
Support multiple boundaries in single diagram
Proper participant ordering within boxes
Descriptive boundary naming conventions

tasks.title: Create Boundary Validation Rules
tasks.description: Implement validation rules ensuring boundary correctness: single external interface, cohesive responsibility, boundary-first reception, control-only decomposition

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Enforce single-actor-to-boundary interaction rule
Validate boundary-type participant receives actor messages first
Validate only control-type participants marked for decomposition
Generate clear warnings for boundary rule violations

tasks.title: Create Hierarchy Management Skill
tasks.description: New skill for managing hierarchical process decomposition, enabling control-type participants to become sub-processes at Level N+1

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Decompose control-type participants into sub-process with own collaboration diagram
Support unlimited hierarchy depth (tested to 5+ levels)
Maintain consistent modeling patterns across levels
Track parent-child relationships between process levels

tasks.title: Implement Sub-Folder Generation
tasks.description: Automatic folder structure creation for decomposed processes with standard files and naming conventions

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Auto-create sub-folder NN-BoundaryName/ for each decomposition
Include standard files: main.md, collaboration.md, process.md, domain-model.md
Consistent naming convention across all hierarchy levels
Populate template content with hierarchy context

tasks.title: Build Cross-Reference Navigation
tasks.description: Bi-directional navigation between hierarchy levels with parent/child links and process index

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Generate parent process links in sub-process main.md
Generate sub-process links in parent main.md
Maintain link integrity when hierarchy changes
Generate process hierarchy index at root level

tasks.title: Add Process Level Tracking and Scale Management
tasks.description: Complexity metrics, decomposition suggestions, and scale management for hierarchy levels

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Calculate complexity metrics per hierarchy level
Warn when diagram exceeds recommended interaction count
Suggest decomposition candidates based on participant type and interaction count
Track current level depth and breadth across hierarchy

tasks.title: Implement EDPS Compliance Checking
tasks.description: Validate generated artifacts against EDPS methodology principles including evolutionary development and incremental refinement

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Validate EDPS-compliant process modeling patterns
Check evolutionary development principle adherence
Verify incremental model refinement support
Generate compliance report with pass/fail indicators

tasks.title: Create Hierarchy Validation Tools
tasks.description: Validate hierarchy consistency including boundary rules, participant types, and level appropriateness

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Detect hierarchy inconsistencies across levels
Validate participant type consistency in decompositions
Check boundary rule compliance at every level
Report validation results with actionable suggestions

tasks.title: Add Change Impact Analysis Across Levels
tasks.description: Analyze how changes at one hierarchy level propagate to parent and child levels

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Identify impacted levels when a boundary changes
Trace requirement changes to affected process levels
Generate change impact report with affected artifacts
Support what-if analysis for proposed changes

tasks.title: Build Documentation Automation
tasks.description: Automated generation of process documentation at each hierarchy level following organizational standards

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Auto-generate main.md with hierarchy context and navigation
Auto-generate process.md with level-appropriate detail
Include participant types, boundary rules, and decomposition status
Follow organizational documentation standards

tasks.title: Create Project 1 Migration Tools
tasks.description: Migration utilities to convert existing flat Project 1 collaboration diagrams to hierarchical format with boundaries

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Import Project 1 collaboration diagrams without modification
Convert flat diagrams to hierarchical format with boundary suggestions
Preserve all existing requirement links and metadata
Add participant type annotations to existing participants

tasks.title: Integrate with Existing Skills Framework
tasks.description: Ensure all new and enhanced skills integrate seamlessly with the existing EDPS skills framework

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All skills callable through GitHub Copilot integration
Cross-skill data flow validated (inputs/outputs compatible)
No breaking changes to existing skill interfaces
New skills registered in skills framework

tasks.title: Update OrgModel with Hierarchical Concepts
tasks.description: Enhance OrgModel process documents with boundary concepts, hierarchical diagrams, and EDPS methodology refinements

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Updated Skill Development Process with hierarchical boundary concepts
Enhanced organizational collaboration diagrams with box syntax
Updated domain model with boundary terminology
Updated process flow with hierarchical decomposition patterns
Updated test cases validating hierarchical modeling

tasks.title: Performance Testing & Optimization
tasks.description: Validate performance requirements and optimize diagram generation for hierarchical models

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Hierarchical diagram generation completes within 30 seconds
5-level hierarchy generates without performance degradation
VS Code preview renders all diagram types correctly
Performance benchmarks documented

tasks.title: Create User Documentation
tasks.description: Comprehensive user documentation including training materials, boundary concept guides, and migration instructions

acceptance_criteria.criterion: User guide for hierarchical process modeling with boundaries
Participant type reference with decomposition rules
Migration guide for Project 1 diagram upgrade
Example walkthroughs for common boundary patterns
